## Contribution policy

Thanks for your interest in contributing to snow-cli.

At this time, unsolicited pull requests from public contributors are not accepted directly. Please open an issue first describing the problem, proposed change, and implementation approach so maintainers can discuss it before code is submitted.

Dependabot pull requests are allowed and handled separately by automation.

## Checklist

- [ ] A linked issue exists for this change
- [ ] Tests and documentation have been updated where appropriate
